MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Roger L. Meredith, Esq. of the Law Offices of Roger L. Meredith, Tel. 415.616.5959, for defendant and moving party;
Timothy S. Brown, Esq. of Midland Credit Management, Tel. 858.309.9735, for plaintiff, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The moving party having provided the Court with a copy of the proof of service, DEFENDANT GIORGIANA GEORGIU'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is taken under submission. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

****** After hearing, the Court grants DEFENDANT GIORGIANA GEORGIU'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Order signed. ******
